task_description: Deep Critical Analysis Round 2 - Fix 7 fundamental architecture problems that prevent the Self-Evolving AI Development Kernel from actually working: output format contract, workspace isolation, structured plan format, skill loading, feedback loop, error recovery, and integration tests. Each round is committed separately.

verification.summary: 473 tests pass at 98.71% coverage. All 7 rounds committed separately. Integration tests exercise full end-to-end flow. Contract validation tests prove output format enforcement.
